evidence_snippet: Adrack wants to surrender and kills Dagon Codd with a throwing axe when the latter objects.

That night, Theon hears Adrack screaming along with the other ironborn. The next day, Theon notices that, among the sixty-three flayed bodies of the ironmen displayed on pikes along the causeway, one of the bodies is one-armed.

During the siege of Moat Cailin, Ramsay Bolton sends Theon Greyjoy to give peace terms to the ironborn garrison, promising them food and safe passage. Adrack wants to surrender and kills Dagon Codd with a throwing axe when the latter objects.
Adrack tells Theon he will name a son after him in gratitude once he returns to the Iron Islands.
